horoscope: A harmonious aspect between Mercury and Venus today points to progress or benefits related to your domestic life, with family, and in your work or daily life, dear Aries. Sound energy is with you for mending fences, enjoying others, and expressing your feelings. Today’s energies are excellent for relationships. It’s a good time to boost connections, especially with people you live or work with. You’ll find that compromising comes far more easily than usual today. Seeing the other side of a story can be most illuminating. Conversations can be clarifying and helpful, and significant agreements and favorable circumstances can result. You can have a stronger desire to find peace in your domestic life or with family now, and you're also seeking more harmony on the job and in your daily life. The Moon in your solar ninth house stirs your curiosity further, boosting your desire to learn and research ideas. A mental approach to the day seems just right at the moment.

You are looking especially good, and your sincerity is appreciated and admired today, dear Taurus. Mercury harmonizes with Venus, your ruler, and this helps smooth over your connections. You are also more creative or able to express your ideas in ways others more fully appreciate. You are magnetizing good things quite naturally now and expressing both your feelings and ideas with the same ease. This transit is easygoing, and, for you, is excellent for negotiations, creative writing, problem-solving, and relationships with love interests, acquaintances, and children. Interactions are easy, smooth, kind, and helpful. Complicated problems are easier to manage when you feel supported and approach them in a relaxed way.

Excellent opportunities can arise to bond with those closest to your heart, dear Gemini, especially on a mental plane. There can be good news or promising developments with family, home, or financial affairs, an exciting new purchase for the household, or a sense of abundance now. Conversations are fruitful and pleasant. Things may seem to be falling into place, which is comforting. The Moon spends the day in your opposing sign, harmonizing with Jupiter, Neptune, and Pluto, and helping you connect in satisfying ways. It's a great time for teaming or pairing up to come up with a good idea or a new perspective on a matter. Discussions are enjoyable. Learning, guiding, and sharing are especially favored. Reaching out and opening up can bring interesting people or ideas into your life today.

You might hear something of great use–something that boosts your understanding, dear Cancer. Conversations can help you reach a new level of interaction. It’s a good time for enjoying time with others, with today's Mercury-Venus transit helping smooth over differences through discussion or clarification. Mercury is currently transiting your sign, and this boost from Venus is particularly helpful. It puts you in a particularly favorable position to collaborate and cooperate. Presenting your ideas, studying, and guiding are likely to go well. You can have different interests or projects on the table that excite and motivate you. There could be promising news or communications. You'll find people are very much in your corner now. Someone may be expressing their affection for you today.

Today's pleasing aspect between Mercury and Venus helps you get into an objective frame of mind, dear Leo. There can be easy solutions to problems now, and you may come up with interesting ideas about how you can improve your financial state. You're in a fabulous position to think or talk through a problem and to gain clarity about a matter, and this is a particular relief after Mercury's recent retrograde. Pleasant exchanges may very well boost your mood. This transit helps you find ways to improve your feelings of comfort, security, and abundance. An income boost is possible, or there is a better understanding of your work or financial needs. It’s a fine time to see emotions and feelings from an intellectual perspective.

You're attracting others quite naturally to you these days with Venus in your sign, dear Virgo, and you're in touch with the gentler, more receptive side of your nature. Today, Venus and Mercury harmonize, bringing especially good energy for sharing ideas, personal thoughts, feelings, and memories. You have a stronger sense than usual about what ideas have true potential for success in the long term. There can be rich ideas about improving your vitality or energy levels circulating, and a friend/network can be beneficial or a source of interesting information. You may gain clarity about a person’s feelings for you, which can be particularly welcome after Mercury's recent retrograde, or you could thoroughly enjoy a conversation about the future.

It can be a psychic, intuitive, and visionary time for you, dear Libra. You can get good support and backing from others in ways that improve your career prospects or reputation. Ideas are particularly rich for sensing what people want, which in turn benefits your relationships. While you’ve been in a cycle for taking stock of your emotional and social life more than pursuing it directly, it’s a good day for sharing your ideas or simply joining in and doing most of the listening. Instead, you might gain an understanding with someone or with a matter from the past, and this is especially welcome after Mercury's recent retrograde. There can be a subtle communication of romantic interest from someone. Transits today promote peaceful cooperation and conversation. Clarity about a relationship or project may come now.

Sharing ideas and playful communications can figure strongly for you today, dear Scorpio. The day favors self-expression, social confidence, and an improved outlook. Mending broken fences through clarifying, respectful, and kind communications can be in strong focus and more successful than usual as Mercury and Venus harmonize. This transit helps smooth things over, and gaining more clarity is especially welcome now after Mercury's recent retrograde. You're bringing a healthy spirit of friendship to your relationships, and your personal appeal is brilliant right now. Gaining friends with an easygoing, charming, and open manner or enhancing current friendships is very likely now. People are showing definite interest in you.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, dear Sagittarius, and you can be feeling inspired and motivated. You're broadening your perspective, and others are especially intrigued by your point of view. Moving a bit out of your comfort zone increases your faith in yourself and the world. Small doses work best since they help grow your trust that you can handle uncertain situations. Friends tend to be supportive without being stifling, and this suits you perfectly. This is a good day for seeing opportunities all around you. With a Mercury-Venus transit in play, it’s a good day for pleasant interactions and special attention to your long-term goals. You could have a meeting of minds with someone in authority, a significant sale, or another type of boost. You're feeling positive and confident about your talents and your value to others. Today is strong for sharing ideas and dilemmas with others, as collaboration seems to lead you to happy places or possible solutions. When it comes to private or personal matters, you’re discussing them rationally and naturally. You may get the chance to clarify your feelings on a matter.

Mercury and Venus connect via a harmonious aspect today, dear Capricorn, and conversations can be pleasant. With Mercury in your partnership sector and Venus in your adventure sector, it's a fine time to pair up to study or exchange ideas. This can be a time of increased warmth in a relationship or good conversations and bonding as you share your broader goals and beliefs. It's also a good time for counseling and gathering beneficial information from others. Benefits and good feelings come from connecting with others today, particularly on romantic and one-on-one levels. Good communication skills can reverberate positivity to other areas of life as well.

Today's transits are strong for giving and receiving support or help, dear Aquarius, particularly through conversations and kind gestures. You might experience a release from a private burden or a debilitating secret. There can also be social benefits related to following your daily routines. You may be attracted to mysteries and hidden motives or investigations of some kind, and you may very well solve a problem or a mystery! Pleasant interactions and discoveries can figure strongly today, lifting your spirits. Certainly, the tendency to think and analyze your feelings and relationships is strong at the moment. Your intuition regarding health or work methods is excellent, and love is easily expressed and attracted today, although you're inclined to show your feelings through quiet support rather than through showy means.

The tendency to think and analyze your feelings and relationships is strong and beneficial today, dear Pisces. You could feel enlightened about (or by) a friendship or relationship. You’re well-positioned to improve the spiritual or friendship component of a connection. Today's easygoing Mercury-Venus influence especially supports connecting with others and cooperating or meeting new people. As a result, clarifying feelings, coming to agreements, and even making romantic overtures are in favor. Conversations about love, children, creative arts, hobbies, or entertainment can be rewarding.
